name: ExtensionDeviceDefinition_Version_Type
title: R5: The type of the device version, e.g. manufacturer, approved, internal (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `DeviceDefinition.version.type` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`DeviceDefinition.version.type` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `DeviceDefinition.version.type` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `DeviceDefinition.version.type` has a context of DeviceDefinition.version based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `DeviceDefinition`.
Element `DeviceDefinition.version.type` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The type of the device version, e.g. manufacturer, approved, internal (new)
